achieve this, service would hold the last finger feature temporarily, until client invoke
() or the client detached from service, the last finger feature will be destroyed immediately.
this check workflow time usage is about 400~500ms
Currently fingerprint service provides engagement/release, management, detection, enrollment and identification functions.
This article is the integrated development guide document
To guide the use of the SDK, the default reader
already familiar with the basic use of the IDE
, with a certain Android programming foundation
efore using the SDK, please be sure to read the document carefully
And try to follow the designation of the
when you build your own project,
Currently SDK only supports Android studio integration
process automatically detect the disconnection from the client application and then release the sensitive data and sensor objects.

use all kinds of fingerprint functions, please call this interface to let fingerprint service power on the fingerprint sensor and hold the file

Please invoke this interface to release fingerprint device,
will power off the fingerprint sensor and release the file description.

this interface, unless application which bund to the fingerprint service crashed or exited, the fingerprint service will not be able to be bund to any other process and fingerprint sensor will continue to power on.
ou can find the demo code in SunmiFingerprintDemo->FingerprintDetectActivity->detectFingerprint()
“no”, mean all data will be transformed from 500X500 raw image data
This interface is designed to get fingerprint image data and fingerprint feature data from sensor.
, at lease you must define the FINGERPRINT_IMAGE_FORMAT setting.

Please note that not all kind of fingerprint sensor support the detection cancelation feature, some fingerprint sensor would block inside util timeout after detection is triggered.

, especially when you use the progress dialog
